name: Helm-heavy Kubernetes fixture

module_reference.name: Helm release with rendered Kubernetes workload
module_reference.source: helm_release plus rendered Kubernetes provider resources
module_reference.upstream_note: The fixture models pipelines that keep Helm release metadata and rendered Kubernetes resources in the plan.

notes: Includes an opaque helm_release resource and rendered child resources.
The rendered Deployment, Service, Ingress, and RBAC resources keep artifact matching and exposure testable.
